effects.desc: Gentle rhythmic size oscillation. Good for idle elements that need to feel alive.
Quick horizontal shake with decay. Use for errors, rejections, or 'wrong' moments.
Fades element to 40% opacity. Use to de-emphasise a secondary element.
Restores a dimmed element to full opacity. Must always be paired with dim.

usage: Each effect entry is either a plain string (fires at t=0) or a [fn, start_t] array. start_t should be >= the entrance animation duration so the effect fires after the element has settled. dim and undim must always appear together.
